title: aster amellus subsp. ibericus
intro: Aster amellus subsp. ibericus, also known as the Iberian autumnal aster, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Aster amellus subsp. ibericus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
